tools.name: list_businesses
tools.title: List businesses
tools.description: List the review-collection businesses owned by the signed-in user, with name, address, Google rating, review page slug, and total ratings.

tools.name: get_business_stats
tools.title: Get business stats
tools.description: Get review-collection stats for one of the signed-in user's businesses: total review events, recent events, subscription plan and status. Pass the business id from list_businesses.

business_id.description: The id of a business owned by the signed-in user.
